name: Process Injection via Maldoc
notes:
This rule detects process injection using maldoc.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Christian Burkard
SIGMA Title: LittleCorporal Generated Maldoc Injection
SIGMA Description: Detects the process injection of a LittleCorporal generated Maldoc.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of winword.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%:\windows\microsoft.net\framework64\v2%' AND LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%unknown%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Process Injection via Maldoc on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of winword.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%:\windows\microsoft.net\framework64\v2%' AND LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%unknown%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Process Injection via Maldoc
Event description: This rule detects process injection using maldoc.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
